Introduction
    Situated 30 miles northwest of Los Angeles in the San Fernando Valley, Sierra Canyon High School has established itself as a perennial powerhouse for Southern California basketball.

Also known as: Top Class: The Life and Times of the Sierra Canyon Trailblazers
